title: Configure testing mode :manual in config/test.exs
prompt: Write a `config/test.exs` snippet that sets the Oban testing mode to `:manual` for `:my_app`. This is required so `assert_enqueued/1` can inspect the database without jobs executing. Include `import Config` and the `testing: :manual` key on the Oban config. Write to `config/test.exs`.
tier_rationale: Single config line; only trap is confusing `:manual` with `:inline`.
